Off Calendar Feb-17-2005 Set For Trial On May-16-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Anthony L. Head, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff and Moving Party. Michael D. Bebow, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Responding Party.
Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Dismissal Order is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court adopted tentative ruling. Court ordered Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Dismissal Granted. Court vacated Dismissal order issued on Nov. 2, 2004. Court ordered Case set for Court Trial on 5/16/2005 at 9:00 AM, in Department 212. Court to give Notice of Trial Date. Court granted Defendant's request for sanctions in the amount of $350.00, in favor of Defendant and against Plaintiff. Court ordered prevailing party to prepare an order. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. (212)
